case_title: HOM, ROBERT VS CITY & COUNTY OF S F PUBLIC HEALTH DPT/AMBUL/SERV et al

docket_entries.description: ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT AS TO PLAINTIFF HOM, ROBERT

MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $3,000.00 FILED BY HOM, ROBERT AS TO DEFENDANT CITY & COUNTY OF S F PUBLIC HEALTH DPT/AMBUL/SERV JONATHAN, FRANK MAILING ADDRESS ONLY-OFFICE OF THE CITY ATTNY-C/O ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUL-25-1997 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT C
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL

CLAIM OF DEFENDANT FOR $403.51 FILED BY CITY & COUNTY OF S F PUBLIC HEALTH DPT/AMBUL/SERV JONATHAN, FRANK AS TO CROSS DEFENDANT HOM, ROBERT ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUL-25-1997 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT C
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT CITY & COUNTY OF S F PUBLIC HEALTH DPT/AMBUL/SERV

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF HOM, ROBERT IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT CITY & COUNTY OF S F PUBLIC HEALTH DPT/AMBUL/SERV JONATHAN, FRANK DEFT'S NAME IS CORRECTED TO: FRANK, JONATHAN STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT CROSS COMPLAINANT CITY & COUNTY OF S F PUBLIC HEALTH DPT/AMBUL/SERV JONATHAN, FRANK RECOVER FROM CROSS DEFENDANT HOM, ROBERT $123.75 PRINCIPAL, TOTAL JUDGMENT $123.75, CROSS-COMPLAINT FRANK IS DISMISSED WITHOUT PREJUDICE STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
CERTIFIED MAIL TO FRANK JONATHAN, EMPLOYEE PUBLIC HEALTH DEPT. RETURNED SIGNED.
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL
